rule.name: Email: Potential Phishing Attachment
rule.description: Email with suspicious RAR attachment detected.

alert.title: Email: Potential Phishing Attachment
alert.summary: Email originating from external domain with a RAR file attachment.

knowledge_base: Email: Potential Phishing Attachment - Analyze the associated files or emails for malicious characteristics.

rule.name: Network: Potential Port Scan Detected
rule.description: High volume of connections across multiple ports.

alert.title: Network: Potential Port Scan Detected
alert.summary: High volume of connections across multiple ports from internal IP.

knowledge_base: Authorized scan, verified with IT team.

rule.name: Execution: Archiver utility spawned
rule.description: WinRAR utility execution observed.

alert.title: Execution: Archiver utility spawned
alert.summary: WinRAR.exe launched by user.

additional_context: WinRAR.exe executed 'Project_Q3_Requirements.rar'. User fell for the phishing email.
knowledge_base: Execution: Archiver utility spawned - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: File: Arbitrary File Write in Startup Folder
rule.description: File created in Startup folder by unexpected process.

alert.title: File: Arbitrary File Write in Startup Folder
alert.summary: WinRAR.exe wrote a file to the Startup directory.

additional_context: Exploitation of CVE-2025-8088/CVE-2025-6218 detected. WinRAR wrote 'startup_check.vbs' directly to the user's Startup folder via directory traversal.
knowledge_base: File: Arbitrary File Write in Startup Folder - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Authentication: Multiple Failed Logons
rule.description: User experienced 4 failed logon attempts within 1 minute.

alert.title: Authentication: Multiple Failed Logons
alert.summary: User experienced 4 failed logon attempts within 1 minute.

knowledge_base: Expected user activity, verified with the user.

rule.name: Network: Large Outbound Data Transfer
rule.description: Large volume of data sent to external IP.

alert.title: Network: Large Outbound Data Transfer
alert.summary: Large volume of data sent to external IP.

knowledge_base: Authorized data transfer/sync process, verified with IT team.

rule.name: Execution: Suspicious Script in Startup
rule.description: WScript executing file from Startup folder.

alert.title: Execution: Suspicious Script in Startup
alert.summary: WScript executing startup_check.vbs.

technique.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Visual Basic

knowledge_base: Execution: Suspicious Script in Startup - Verify the process execution and command line arguments with the System Administrator.

rule.name: Network: Suspicious PowerShell Download
rule.description: PowerShell making external network connection to uncommon TLD.

alert.title: Network: Suspicious PowerShell Download
alert.summary: PowerShell downloading payload from external IP.

knowledge_base: Network: Suspicious PowerShell Download

rule.description: nltest executed.

additional_context: Adversary executing nltest /dclist: to find domain controllers.

rule.name: Credential Access: LSASS Memory Dump
